message:
feat: add tab overview with live previews and running indicator

- Add "Show All Tabs" feature (⌘⇧A) with live scaled previews
- Show • indicator when at prompt, * when command running in tab bar
- Title bar on top of preview cards like Ghostty
- Blue highlight border on active tab in overview
- "+" card to create new tab from overview
- Fix panel resize after reparenting to get correct dimensions for splits
